overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from covered service alleys with overhead pipes through sunlit open plazas with metal frameworks, past industrial equipment and under massive overpasses, showcasing cyberpunk architecture with smokestacks, gantry cranes, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial service alley with overhead pipes

events.description: exits covered alley into open industrial plaza with metal frameworks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow industrial corridor toward the bright exit

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete walls with industrial piping attached
large orange and silver pipes running along the ceiling of the alley
distant industrial complex with multiple levels and ventilation systems

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow covered industrial alley with green concrete walls and large overhead pipes. The camera walks forward through the shaded corridor, emerging at the end into a brightly lit open area with visible metal frameworks and distant smokestacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial plaza with metal truss structures

events.description: turns right at intersection to navigate around industrial equipment

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza and turning right at the intersection toward the tanker truck

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near the industrial complex entrance

entered.detail: large industrial metal archway structure spanning across the plaza
tall chimneys emitting white steam against the blue sky
large white industrial tanker truck parked near the intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a sunlit industrial plaza dominated by a large metal truss framework. The camera walks forward then turns right at an intersection, revealing a large white tanker truck and distant smokestacks. A lone pedestrian is visible near the industrial complex in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with garage and gantry crane

agents.ego_description: navigating along the street past the tanker truck and approaching the Autowerks garage

notable_agents.action: woman in minimal clothing crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: green industrial building with yellow neon 'Autowerks' signage
large yellow industrial gantry crane structure over the road
towering futuristic skyscraper with circular architectural details

segments.scene_description: Walking along the industrial street, the camera passes the large white tanker truck on the right and approaches the Autowerks garage with its distinctive neon sign. A pedestrian crosses the street ahead, and a massive futuristic skyscraper looms on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with red support pillars

events.description: black sedan drives through the underpass from ahead toward camera

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered underpass toward the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: worker in safety vest walking toward camera on the left sidewalk

entered.detail: large covered walkway with corrugated metal roof and exposed beams
massive red painted steel support columns lining the underpass
linear overhead lighting fixtures illuminating the shaded corridor
piles of blue and white trash bags accumulated along the left wall

segments.scene_description: Entering a long covered underpass with red steel pillars and overhead fluorescent lighting, the camera continues walking through the shaded corridor. A worker in a safety vest walks toward the camera on the left, while a black sedan drives through the underpass. The distant city skyline is visible at the far end of the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded industrial corridor into a sunlit plaza before descending into a massive urban underpass. It begins in a narrow covered alley with green concrete walls and overhead pipes, moving forward until the shaded corridor opens into a brightly lit industrial plaza dominated by metal truss frameworks and distant smokestacks. As the camera turns right at an intersection, the scene expands past a large white tanker truck and a lone pedestrian toward the neon sign of an Autowerks garage, with a futuristic skyscraper looming overhead. The movement then shifts from the open sunlight into a long covered underpass characterized by red steel pillars and fluorescent lighting. Finally, the camera passes a worker in a safety vest and a driving black sedan while heading toward the distant city skyline visible at the tunnel's end.
